Dialog Pop-Up
Test Flow
info:
# Run Once

 1. Initialize Global Variables
 2. Initialize Connected Hardware
    -  LabJack T7
    -  Siglent Power Supply

# Run Each Test

1. Prompt user to scan Serial Number
2. Prompt user to insert DUT
    - Prompt will disapear once DUT is installed and top is closed
3. Turn on Power Supply

rules.to: {"title":"PCB Serial Number","content":"Please Scan or Enter Serial Number","okText":"OK","cancelText":"Cancel","textLabel":"Serial Number"}

name: Functional Test Start
info:
- This is the start of the functional test
- This will be run for each DUT

name: Prompt User for Serial Number & DUT Install
info:
- If S/N is entered add to global.serial_num
- If no S/N, then do not save any of the results

name: Serial Number?

rules.to: {"title":"Install DUT","content":"Please Place DUT in Fixture and Close Top","cancelText":"Cancel","okText":"OK"}
